protein_name: May regulate cilium motility through its role in the assembly of the axonemal radial spokes. 5 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: axoneme; cilium; cytoskeleton; motile cilium; radial spoke stalk; sperm flagellum
raw_fields.Biological Process: cilium movement; cilium organization; flagellated sperm motility; sperm flagellum assembly; sperm mitochondrial sheath assembly
